userStories.title: Inspect real schema - modelo_instruccion, modelo_regla_inclusion, modelo_trigger_keyword
acceptanceCriteria: Inspect production columns for modelo_instruccion, modelo_regla_inclusion, modelo_trigger_keyword, modelo_casilla, modelo_recurso and modelo_normativa before any inserts.
Inspect aeat_modelo and modelo_campana join columns.
Write the real schema to docs/schema-modelo-tables.md.
Confirm modelo 289 id and campana_id.
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; $COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -c "SELECT table_name, COUNT(*) cols FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name IN ('modelo_instruccion','modelo_regla_inclusion','modelo_trigger_keyword','modelo_casilla') GROUP BY table_name ORDER BY table_name" && test -f docs/schema-modelo-tables.md && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Load modelo_normativa - RD 1021/2015 and DAC2 Directive
acceptanceCriteria: Prerequisite: J-01 passed and schema confirmed.
Add RD 1021/2015, LGT DA 22 and DAC2 32014L0107 as official normativa references for Modelo 289.
Use the real modelo_normativa schema from docs/schema-modelo-tables.md.
Verify source URLs before inserting.
Modelo 289 normativa count must be >= 4.
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; ID=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT id FROM aeat_modelo WHERE codigo='289' LIMIT 1"); COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM modelo_normativa WHERE modelo_id=$ID"); echo "Normativa 289: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 4 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Load modelo_instruccion - CRS/289 classification rules
acceptanceCriteria: Prerequisite: J-01 schema confirmed.
Load at least five Modelo 289 instructions: IFO classification, reportable account, filing period, NilReport and corrections.
Use AEAT CRS technical guide v2.6 and RD 1021/2015 as sources.
Use exact columns from docs/schema-modelo-tables.md.
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; CAMP=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT mc.id FROM modelo_campana mc JOIN aeat_modelo am ON am.id=mc.modelo_id WHERE am.codigo='289' LIMIT 1"); COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM modelo_instruccion WHERE campana_id=$CAMP"); echo "Instrucciones 289: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 5 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Load modelo_regla_inclusion - CRS inclusion/exclusion rules
acceptanceCriteria: Prerequisite: J-01 schema confirmed.
Load at least six structured CRS inclusion/exclusion rules for Modelo 289.
Rules must cover custodian, depository, investment entity, governmental exclusion, active NFE and de minimis threshold.
Use exact columns from docs/schema-modelo-tables.md.
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; CAMP=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT mc.id FROM modelo_campana mc JOIN aeat_modelo am ON am.id=mc.modelo_id WHERE am.codigo='289' LIMIT 1"); COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM modelo_regla_inclusion WHERE campana_id=$CAMP"); echo "Reglas inclusión 289: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 6 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Load modelo_trigger_keyword - CRS/289 routing keywords
acceptanceCriteria: Prerequisite: J-01 schema confirmed.
Load at least eight CRS/Modelo 289 routing keywords.
Inspect modelo_fiscal_calendar before adding deadline data.
Use modelo_id for modelo_trigger_keyword because production schema has no campana_id.
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; ID=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT id FROM aeat_modelo WHERE codigo='289'"); COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM modelo_trigger_keyword WHERE modelo_id=$ID"); echo "Keywords 289: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 8 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Load modelo_casilla - XSD fields for CRS/289
acceptanceCriteria: Prerequisite: J-01 schema confirmed.
Load at least 20 CRS/289 XSD structural fields as modelo_casilla rows.
Use campana_id because production modelo_casilla has no modelo_id.
Represent XSD path in codigo or etiqueta according to schema.
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; ID=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT id FROM aeat_modelo WHERE codigo='289'"); COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM modelo_casilla WHERE campana_id IN (SELECT id FROM modelo_campana WHERE modelo_id=$ID)"); echo "Casillas 289: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 20 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Update mcp_validation_suite - CRS/289 completeness checks
acceptanceCriteria: Add validation-suite checks for Modelo 289 normativa, instrucciones, reglas, keywords, casillas and profile obligations.
Add deep contract checks for buscar_modelos_aeat_catalogo(codigo='289').
Run both suites on VPS against the full corpus.
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm ops python mcp_validation_suite.py --read-only --base-url http://api:8000 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm ops python mcp_deep_contract_audit.py 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Final verification - Sprint J complete
acceptanceCriteria: Modelo 289 has normativa >= 4, instrucciones >= 5, reglas_inclusion >= 6, trigger_keywords >= 8 and casillas >= 20.
Profile obligations 289 remain four profiles and verified=true.
Local pytest apps/ -q passes with no regressions.
VPS validation suites return ok=true, /status is healthy and Alertmanager has zero active alerts.
Sprint J report and master roadmap are updated.
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/ -q --basetemp .pytest-tmp 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep 'passed' && echo 'Run J-07 suites on VPS before marking PASS' && echo PASS
